name: Tunable MAGMAX: Preference-Aware Model Merging for Continual Learning

description: arXiv:2605.20803v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Continual learning (CL) aims to train models sequentially on multiple tasks while mitigating catastrophic forgetting of previously learned knowledge. Recent advances in large pre-trained models (LPMs) and model merging techniques, such as MAGMAX, have demonstrated effective CL performance by combining task-specific parameters. However, e...
author: Kei Hiroshima, Kento Uchida, Shinichi Shirakawa
